name: RABBIT-CAGE-12
title: rbt-sync-check.sh: additionalContext from Stop hook not injected — only systemMessage processed
description: When rbt-sync-check.sh detects CLAUDE.md drift, it emits JSON with both additionalContext (the refreshed policy section) and systemMessage. Claude Code processes the systemMessage (alert appears: '[rbt] Policy drift detected') but silently drops the additionalContext for Stop hooks. The refreshed policy is never injected into the running session's context. The user must start a new session to pick up the regenerated CLAUDE.md. Expected: additionalContext from Stop hooks is prepended to the next user turn's context, giving immediate policy refresh. Actual: only systemMessage works for Stop hooks; additionalContext is not supported at this hook event type. Verified in rabbit-sprint: drift alert appeared, context was not refreshed, session continued with stale policy knowledge.

history.note: [skip-vet: vet-triage.json written by main session triage agent]

Fix incomplete: counter reset to 0 does not trigger injection on next prompt. rbt-refresh.sh threshold is 20 — counter=0 means 20 more prompts before injection, not 1. rbt-session-init.sh is SessionStart-only; setting counter to 0 does not invoke it. Reopening to fix the actual injection trigger.
[skip-vet: vet-triage.json written by main-session triage agent; fix verified by tests 7/7]
